I have successfully resolved the readability and sizing issues of the POS cart payment block by moving the calculators into absolute-positioned floating popovers.

### Summary of Completed Changes:
1. **Descriptive Icons & Larger Buttons**:
   - Upgraded the 5 payment selectors in [dashboard.html](file:///c:/Users/MASTER%20PC/Downloads/restrosuite/dashboard.html) (`Cash`, `UPI`, `Card`, `Due`, `Split`) with clear FontAwesome icons and increased touch-friendly sizes (taller height and larger text paddings).

ER%20PC/Downloads/restrosuite/assets/features-pos.js) that automatically dismisses any active popover when clicking anywhere else outside the payment row.
4. **Synchronization**:

   - Ran `npm test` successfully (all 75 tests are passing).

Please refer to the updated [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/MASTER%20PC/.gemini/antigravity/brain/5e5752b8-61ce-4276-ba23-d6db96bda092/walkthrough.md) for more details.
